prompt: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion portrait of a beautiful young South Asian woman standing alone on the Hatirjheel lakeside promenade in Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is centered in a full-body vertical composition, smiling warmly at the camera with one hand in her trouser pocket and the other lightly touching her hair near her ear. She has long softly styled brown hair with subtle highlights, natural polished makeup, and an elegant confident posture. Outfit: a fitted cream ribbed long-sleeve knit top tucked into high-waisted wide-leg black trousers, black pointed flats, and a dark wristwatch. Background: calm lake water with soft reflections, the white arched Hatirjheel bridge on the left in the distance, palm trees on the right, a paved walkway, low landscaping with green shrubs and small red flowers, and a dark signboard reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. Lighting is warm sunset/golden hour with gentle rim light, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, crisp fashion editorial detail, natural colors, 35mm full-frame photography look, high resolution. Constraints: the model must be the only person visible; include exactly one person, one visible signboard, one arched bridge, and two prominent palm tree trunks; no men, no extra women, no crowds, no tourists, no photographers, no foreground vehicles, no distracting logos, no watermark, no text other than the signboard.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion portrait of a beautiful young South Asian woman standing alone on the Hatirjheel lakeside promenade in Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is centered in a full-body vertical composition, smiling warmly at the camera with one hand in her trouser pocket and the other lightly touching her hair near her ear. She has long softly styled brown hair with subtle highlights, natural polished makeup, and an elegant confident posture. Outfit: a fitted cream ribbed long-sleeve knit top tucked into high-waisted wide-leg black trousers, black pointed flats, and a dark wristwatch. Background: calm lake water with soft reflections, the white arched Hatirjheel bridge on the left in the distance, palm trees on the right, a paved walkway, low landscaping with green shrubs and small red flowers, and a dark signboard reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. Lighting is warm sunset/golden hour with gentle rim light, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, crisp fashion editorial detail, natural colors, 35mm full-frame photography look, high resolution. Constraints: the model must be the only person visible; include exactly one person, one visible signboard, one arched bridge, and two prominent palm tree trunks; no men, no extra women, no crowds, no tourists, no photographers, no foreground vehicles, no distracting logos, no watermark, no text other than the signboard.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的编辑风格时尚肖像，主角是 一位美丽的南亚年轻女性，她正独自站在孟加拉国达卡的 Hatirjheel 湖畔步道上，时间为黄金时刻。她位于全身垂直构图的中心，对着镜头温暖微笑，一只手插在裤兜里，另一只手轻轻触碰耳边的头发。她留着柔顺的棕色长发，带有细微的挑染，妆容自然精致，姿态优雅自信。着装：修身米色罗纹长袖针织衫，搭配高腰黑色阔腿裤，穿着黑色尖头平底鞋，佩戴深色手表。背景：平静的湖水映衬着柔和的倒影，左侧远处可见白色的 Hatirjheel 拱桥，右侧有棕榈树，铺设整齐的步道，低矮的景观绿植和红色小花，以及一块深色指示牌，上面写着 হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা。光线为温暖的日落/黄金时刻，带有柔和的轮廓光，皮肤纹理真实，景深较浅，呈现出清晰的时尚编辑细节，色彩自然，具有 35mm 全画幅摄影质感，高分辨率。约束条件：画面中只能出现该模特一人；必须包含且仅包含一个人、一个可见的指示牌、一座拱桥和两棵显眼的棕榈树树干；禁止出现男性、其他女性、人群、游客、摄影师、前景车辆、干扰性标志、水印，以及除指示牌文字之外的任何文字。
